final_prompt.prompt:
Design an original, non-infringing marketing cover image for a WeChat article about a fragrance product launch.

Style/medium: needs a premium, high-end aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be centered composition, with the title as the focal point
Subject: must include the fragrance product launch theme "染秋"
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: needs an autumn atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs an autumn color direction — exact hex values are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "染秋" (large, primary), "秋意染染 时光留香" (secondary)
Constraints: must preserve 900x500 aspect ratio, title must be prominent
Avoid:
